message:
feat(web): Improve mobile sequence grid with orientation-aware sizing

- Add orientation detection for mobile devices (portrait vs landscape)
- Reduce base cell sizes on mobile for denser genome view:
  - Small phones portrait: 6-7px cells (from 10-11px)
  - Small phones landscape: 5-6px cells for maximum density
  - Tablets: 8-10px cells with micro-text visible
- Cells 4-8px now show micro-text using bitmap fonts (already implemented)
- Landscape orientation automatically uses smaller cells to show more columns
- Improved touch scroll momentum:
  - Lower friction (0.92) for natural iOS-like feel
  - Exponential moving average for smoother velocity tracking

This enables:
- 50-100 columns visible on mobile landscape (vs ~30 before)
- Tiny but readable letters inside each cell
- Natural-feeling touch scrolling with momentum

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
